roles.description: Full, unrestricted access to every module.
Quality Assurance administrator — approvals, audit trail, reports.
Departmental oversight — approves TNI/JD, reviews training status.
Plans schedules, manages assignments and attendance.
Creates courses, question banks and materials; handles TNI/course authoring.
Takes assigned training & assessments, acknowledges JD, owns CV.
Technical administration — users, roles, configuration, backups.
Read-only access to records, audit trail and reports (with print/export).
User & team management, JD/TNI assignment & approval, training oversight and reports.
Training Coordinator Manages the Training Software related functions and courses

systemConfig.description: Number of previous passwords that may not be reused
Inactivity timeout before the screen locks
Failed logins before the account locks
Lockout duration after too many failed logins
Organisation name shown on reports & certificates
Cron for the daily AD sync job
Maximum upload size in MB (training videos; hard ceiling 1 GB)
UR-80: comma-separated client IP prefixes allowed to access the app (empty = no restriction)
Default number of questions per assessment
UR-43: require an active training assignment before a quiz is accessible
CR-33: revoke a trainee’s access to training material once they have completed the training
